message:
🌱 argo-events: The `JoinChannel` api call is fully deprecated for new Slack applications (#1030)

* 🌱 Add argo-events: The `JoinChannel` api call is fully deprecated for new mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct PR link for argo-events#726 to PR#777

PR #324 fixes issue #308 (different issue). PR #777 'fix: switch slack
lib and stop using deprecated APIs. Fixes #726' is the correct merged PR.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-events-726-the-joinchannel-api-call-is-fully-deprecated-for-new-slack-appli",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: The `JoinChannel` api call is fully deprecated for new Slack applications",
+    "description": "The `JoinChannel` api call is fully deprecated for new Slack applications. Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-events deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-events version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nhelm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-events installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nSlack has deprecated the channels.join api call and suggests to use conversations.join instead. API calls now return with `method_deprecated` for `JoinChannel` when you are using a Slack app created after June 10th (or so)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for The `JoinChannel` api call is fully deprecated for new…",
+        "description": "- Resolves #308 \n- Adds signature verification if Signing Secret is provided as a Kubernetes secret reference in the Gateway configmap.\n\nAdds support for Slack Interactions - action events generated when a user interacts with a [block elements and interactive\n```yaml\nsensors/triggers/slack/slack.go\n114:\t_, _, _, err = api.JoinConversation(channel)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"The `JoinChannel` api call is fully deprecated for new…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "- Resolves #308 \n- Adds signature verification if Signing Secret is provided as a Kubernetes secret reference in the Gateway configmap.\n\nAdds support for Slack Interactions - action events generated when a user interacts with a [block elements and interactive components](https://api.slack.com/messaging/interactivity#components).",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "sensors/triggers/slack/slack.go\n114:\t_, _, _, err = api.JoinConversation(channel)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
